title: Democrats split over response to Trump’s Iran strikes
description: The breaks between the party’s peace and interventionist wings are ones Democrats will have to contend with ahead of the midterms.
content: The breaks between the party’s peace and interventionist wings are ones Democrats will have to contend with ahead of the midterms.
